name: codex-toys-monorepo
description: Codex bridge, toybox, remote, workbench, actions, proxy, kits, and CLI tools.

scripts.build: vp run --filter @codex-toys/bridge --filter @codex-toys/toybox --filter @codex-toys/feed --filter @codex-toys/workbench --filter @codex-toys/actions --filter @codex-toys/remote --filter @codex-toys/proxy --filter @codex-toys/kits --filter codex-toys build && vp run --filter codex-toys-docs build
scripts.check:types: vp run --concurrency-limit 1 --filter @codex-toys/bridge --filter @codex-toys/toybox --filter @codex-toys/feed --filter @codex-toys/workbench --filter @codex-toys/actions --filter @codex-toys/remote --filter @codex-toys/proxy --filter @codex-toys/kits --filter codex-toys --filter codex-toys-docs check:types && vp run -w docs:check
scripts.release:check: vp run --filter @codex-toys/bridge --filter @codex-toys/toybox --filter @codex-toys/feed --filter @codex-toys/workbench --filter @codex-toys/actions --filter @codex-toys/remote --filter @codex-toys/proxy --filter @codex-toys/kits release:check && vp run --filter codex-toys release:check && tsx scripts/check-publish-metadata.ts
